content: Next.js next/image custom loader: in next.config.ts set images.loader to 'custom' and images.loaderFile to a path like ./lib/r2/image-loader.ts. The loader file is a use-client module exporting a default function that takes src, width, quality and returns a URL string. For R2/CDN the loader builds a cdn.anydiscussion.com URL with width and quality query params. Also configure images.remotePatterns to whitelist the CDN host if any raw images bypass the loader. sharp is bundled with next/image for server-side optimization; for uploads you also invoke sharp directly to produce resized variants before R2 put.
